post.description: Create a new user account and issue its initial token pair.
Authenticate a user and issue a fresh access and refresh token pair.

schema.title: Response Login User V1 Auth Login Post

post.description: Rotate a valid refresh token into a new session pair.

schema.title: Response Refresh Auth V1 Auth Refresh Post

post.description: Invalidate an active refresh token and end the current authenticated session.

get.description: Return the URL that should be opened to start the Strava connection flow.

schema.title: Response Start Strava Auth V1 Auth Strava Get

get.description: Complete the Strava callback flow for the authenticated user.

schema.title: Response Finish Strava Auth V1 Auth Strava Callback Get

patch.description: Apply partial profile and goal updates for the authenticated user.

post.description: Accept an avatar upload and store a deterministic local placeholder URL.

get.description: Return today's nutrition summary and meals.
Return meal logs inside the requested date range.

post.description: Persist a confirmed nutrition log entry.

patch.description: Update an existing nutrition log entry.

delete.description: Delete a nutrition log entry owned by the current user.

post.description: Parse an uploaded voice note into a reviewable nutrition suggestion.
Parse an uploaded meal photo into a reviewable nutrition suggestion.

get.description: Search the food database used by manual logging flows.
Return a seven-day nutrition rollup ending on the requested date.
Return today's training summary and generated plan.
Return the details for a single training activity.

post.description: Synchronize recent Strava activities for the authenticated user.

get.description: Return the CTL, ATL, and TSB load curve for the requested window.
Return weekly training summaries for charts and review views.

post.description: Send a text message to the coach and persist the generated reply.
Handle a push-to-talk coach message and persist the generated reply.

get.description: Return saved coach conversation previews for the authenticated user.
Return the full history for a saved coach conversation.
Return the current integration status for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Disconnect the current user's Strava integration.
Disconnect the current user's Google Calendar integration.

get.description: Return a lightweight health response for local orchestration.
